Notes: Use genuine Pico or Pico H (pre-soldered headers)
4-pin I2C variant (VCC GND SCL SDA); most include pull-up resistors
Place close to Pico VSYS pin
Or order custom PCB from KiCad gerbers
All prices approximate; shipping not included

Description: 1. The Pico H variant includes pre-soldered male headers making it easier to use in a perfboard build.
2. SSD1306 modules with 4-pin I2C usually include 4.7kohm pull-ups on SDA/SCL. If yours does not, add 4.7kohm resistors from SDA and SCL to 3.3V.
3. Total BOM cost under $10 when ordering in small quantities. Bulk pricing can reduce this to ~$5.
4. Optional: add a 10uF electrolytic capacitor across the battery + and - for improved noise rejection.
